workplan: Implement all 8 high-fidelity screens: HomeScreen with interactive Urdu-glowing microphone, ProvidersScreen list view with category parsing badges, ProviderDetailScreen detailed profile and dynamic fee adjustments, BookingConfirmationScreen displaying Job completion codes, TrackingScreen mapping status lines and modal Stepper sheets, DisputeScreen reporting complaint forms, DisputeResolutionScreen generating shield success badges, and BaselineCompareScreen showing analytical speed benchmarks.
decisions_made: Wrote HomeScreen voice overlay simulator capturing Roman Urdu user commands
Configured ProvidersScreen rendering parsed confidence gauges alongside shimmer loaders
Coded ProviderDetailScreen displaying granular dynamic price calculations (base + travel adjustments)
Crafted BookingConfirmationScreen highlighting completed jobs amber 6-digit confirmation key
Developed TrackingScreen interactive pipeline featuring Status advancement debugger buttons
Wrote DisputeScreen and DisputeResolutionScreen auto-resolving client disputes and refunding wallet credit immediately
Programmed BaselineCompareScreen presenting visual comparative latency improvements (92s keywords vs 3s conversational)
outcome: Phase 4 complete. 8 standard-setting mobile screen interfaces successfully constructed.
